characters.name: Akane Heiya
characters.description: Akane Heiya Akane HeiyaFirst StageSecond StageKanji塀谷 朱音Furiganaヘイヤ あかねRomajiHeiya AkaneBiological InformationHair colorBlackEye colorDark brownRelativesUnnamed mother†Unnamed fatherStatusAliveProfessional InformationOccupationHigh school studentBorderland citizenshipPlayerSpecialtySpadesDebutChapterFourth Side Story (1)Akane Heiya(塀谷朱音,Heiya Akane)is one of the characters inAlice in Borderland. She specializes in♠ Spadeswith a particular affinity for archery. Heiya has waist-length black hair, thin eyes, and a sharp chin. Her waist, left wrist, and left thigh are wrapped with ragged bandages, and the ones on her thigh are splattered with blood. Her left bicep is wrapped in a piece of torn fabric, likely a handkerchief. She wears a crop top and a skirt, both very short and tattered, likely the remnants of her school uniform. She also wears heavy-duty fingerless gloves on both hands. Her face rarely holds a positive expression. Prior to coming to the Borderland, Heiya had a low outlook on life and on herself as a result of childhood trauma. She did not care about anything, never tried to pursue anything, and casually slept with men to get what she wanted, believing she could die young once her youthful appeal faded. However, her outlook changed during her first game. As she faced death repeatedly, she reflected on how carelessly she had lived. While struggling to survive, she came to understand the value of life. Her experiences in the Borderland hardened her immensely. By the Second Stage, she is strong and resourceful, but also short-tempered, especially towardHayato Dodowhen they first meet.

characters.name: Akifumi Seto
characters.description: Akifumi Seto Akifumi SetoKanji瀬戸 秋文Furiganaセト あきふみRomajiSeto AkifumiBiological InformationHair colorBlackEye colorDark brownStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationBorderland citizenshipPlayerDebutChapterChapter 44Akifumi Seto(瀬戸秋文,Seto Akifumi)is a minor character inAlice in Borderland, who participates in theJack of Heartsgame, "Solitary Confinement". Seto is a young man with short black hair, wearing a dark hoodie and white trousers. His face usually expresses fear and confusion, and it quickly gets covered in multiple bruises and blood stains. Seto is a timid person who has always been an easy target for bullies. He accepts kindness but understands if people prefer not to defend him. Seto's dissatisfaction with his own weakness slowly builds up and cultivates with the decision to stand up for himself when offered a chance.

characters.name: Akitomo Mino
characters.description: Akitomo MinoKanji箕面 瞭知Furiganaミノー あきともRomajiMinoo AkitomoBiological InformationHair colorBlackEye colorDark brownStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationBorderland citizenshipPlayerDebutChapterChapter 44Akitomo Minō(箕面瞭知,Minoo Akitomo)is a minor character inAlice in Borderland, who participates in theJack of Heartsgame, "Solitary Confinement". Mino is a teenager with short black hair and half-closed eyes. His facial expression remains indifferent regardless of the situation, and the accessory that makes him stand out is his gray scarf on top on a light-colored hoodie. Mino is sharp and observant, he hides his emotions well and prefers to rely on logic instead of feelings. When forced into a deadly game, he chooses to kill instead of being killed and prioritizes the search for the Jack of Hearts' identity over survival. characters.name: Amon Komayama
characters.description: Amon KomayamaKanji駒山 阿門Furiganaこまやま アモンHiraganaだいやのじゃっくRomajiKomayama AmonDaiya no JakkuAlias(es)Jack of DiamondsBiological InformationHair colorBlackEye colorDark brownStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationFormer occupation(s)Crime Syndicate Gambling RepresentativeBorderland citizenshipCitizenSpecialtyDiamondsPositionJack of DiamondsDebutChapterSixth Side Story (1)Amon Komayama(駒山阿門,Komayama Amon)is a minor antagonist inAlice in Borderland. He is aCitizenwho serves as theJack of Diamonds(だいやのじゃっく,Daiya no Jakku)inBorderland. Komayama has long, dark hair pulled tightly back, revealing a high forehead. He wears traditional layered clothing, including a dark kimono over a light, striped shirt. There are two scars on his face: one across his right eye, caused by a wound that left him blind in that eye, and another across the bridge of his nose, below the eyes. He has a cold, stern, confident expression expression that does not change until the end of the game. Komayama displays a confident and nonchalant attitude throughout the game, regardless of anyone else's moves.Chishiyadescribes his gambling skills as "safe", which suggests that he is calculating and rational, yet cautious. However, his logic proves flawed, as he underestimates his capable opponent and fails to account for the irrational decisions of other players, which ultimately leads to his demise. Komayama displays a confident and nonchalant attitude throughout the game, regardless of anyone else's moves.Chishiyadescribes his gambling skills as "safe", which suggests that he is calculating and rational, yet cautious. However, his logic proves flawed, as he underestimates his capable opponent and fails to account for the irrational decisions of other players, which ultimately leads to his demise. When the final score is revealed, his previously calm and composed facade breaks. He becomes abrasive and bewildered, having never seriously considered the possibility of losing.

characters.name: Asahi Kujo
characters.description: Asahi Kujo Asahi KujoKanji九条 朝陽Furiganaくじょう アサヒRomajiKujou AsahiBiological InformationStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationOccupationHigh school studentBorderland citizenshipDealerSpecialtyClubsFormer affiliation(s)BeachFormer rank(s)035DebutChapterChapter 18Asahi Kujō(九条朝陽,Kujou Asahi)is a supporting character inAlice in Borderland, who first appears as one of theBeachmembers. She is always accompanied by her friend,Momoka. Asahi is a young woman with short bob-cut hair. She typically wears a bikini with a T-shirt on top and a necklace. Asahi is less concerned about having to kill for survival than Momoka, and she does not initially believe in saving the players. However, she is a loyal friend who decides to play the game Momoka initiates in order to support her beliefs, and seeing events unfold as intended by the game master disheartens and enrages her.

characters.name: Benzo Yashige
characters.description: Benzo Yashige Benzo YashigeKanji弥重 勉三Furiganaやしげ ベンゾーRomajiYashige BenzouBiological InformationStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationOccupationMathematicianBorderland citizenshipPlayerSpecialtyDiamondsDebutChapterSixth Side Story (1)Benzō Yashige(弥重勉三,Yashige Benzou)is a minor character inAlice in Borderland, who participates in theKing of Diamondsgame, "Beauty Contest". Yashige is a disheveled, wrinkly old man with a "daunting", off-putting face, with wide, bulging pale eyes and gapped teeth, giving him the appearance of a poorly aged grandpa. He has a smooth head with dark age spots around the sides of his scalp and cheeks, wearing a simple loose shirt with fitted pants and black shoes. Before the "Beauty Contest" game commences, he is seen wearing a translucent raincoat and having a hunched-over posture. Yashige is an eccentric person. His first interaction withTakashi Asumais Yashige asking the latter about his favorite number. He also seems capable of pulling random facts out of his head, such as that 9.517 is the result of multiplying 307 by 31, and then explaining that all numbers are either prime or a result of multiplying prime numbers. However, Yashige's overconfidence and his tendency to complicate the most simple math when choosing a number quickly leads to his demise.

characters.name: Chota Segawa
characters.description: Chota Segawa Chōta SegawaKanji勢川 張太RomajiSegawa ChoutaBiological InformationHair colorBlondAge18StatusDeceasedProfessional InformationOccupationHigh school studentBorderland citizenshipPlayerDebutChapterChapter 1Chōta Segawa(勢川 張太,Segawa Chouta)is a recurring character inAlice in Borderland.  He is friends withRyohei ArisuandDaikichi Karube. Chota is a short, light-haired boy who is usually seen wearing his school uniform, consisting of a white shirt and black trousers. His hair is tied in a ponytail, with two strands hanging loose at the front. Chota is a timid person, but he is not particularly shy. Around his two friends, Arisu and Karube, he is open and outspoken. He enjoys making jokes and rarely takes anything seriously. He does not care much about his mock exams, saying that he will probably not even get into a vocational school. Although he is rather childish, he remains kind and loyal, as shown when he took responsibility for Arisu after he broke a window. Chota also shows a strong interest in women. When he first appears, he creates a puddle just to see a girl's panties in the reflection. During his time in the Borderland, he is nervous and anxious, yet in his final moments, he smiles, accepting his fate and helping Arisu achieve victory.

characters.name: Enji Matsushita
characters.description: Enji Matsushita Enji MatsushitaKanji松下 苑治Furiganaまつした エンジHiraganaはーとのじゃっくRomajiMatsushita EnjiHāto no JakkuAlias(es)Jack of HeartsBiological InformationHair colorBlackEye colorDark brownStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationFormer occupation(s)HypnotherapistBorderland citizenshipCitizenSpecialtyHeartsPositionJack of HeartsDebutChapterChapter 44Enji Matsushita(松下苑治,Matsushita Enji)is a minor antagonist inAlice in Borderland. He is aCitizenwho serves as theJack of Hearts(はーとのじゃっく,Hāto no Jakku)inBorderland. Matsushita has slightly curly, chin-length black hair with long bangs worn over his right eye. He is of average height and has a very angular face with defined cheekbones. He wears a black blazer over a T-shirt and slip-on shoes. He believes in the art of hypnotism and relishes being an eternal Citizen in the Borderland, where he can control and manipulate players to his heart's content. characters.name: Ginji Kyuma
characters.description: Ginji Kyuma Ginji KyumaKanji久間 欣治FuriganaキューマぎんじHiraganaくらぶのきんぐRomajiKyuuma GinjiKurabu no KinguAlias(es)King of ClubsBiological InformationHair colorBlackEye colorDark brownRelativesFather†StatusDeceasedProfessional InformationOccupationMusicianBorderland citizenshipCitizenSpecialtyClubsPositionKing of ClubsDebutChapterChapter 33Ginji Kyūma(久間欣治,Kyuuma Ginji)is a supporting character inAlice in Borderland. He is aCitizenwho serves as theKing of Clubs(くらぶのきんぐ,Kurabu no Kingu)inBorderland. Kyuma is a tall man with a fit build. He has long, curly black hair that is pulled back. Because he is a nudist, he is often seen not wearing any clothes, including when he first meetsArisu's team in the game of"Osmosis". Kyuma has a generally positive and friendly personality. He is kind to both opponents and teammates. He places great importance on treating everyone equally and making fair decisions during games. This is strongly reflected in his game of Scoring Points, where he requires all decisions to be made by unanimous vote. After his father's death from stomach cancer, Kyuma comes to understand how precious and short life is. He decides to enjoy every moment and not hold back, so that he can die without regrets. He is also very attached to his associates (Goken,Uta,Shitara, andMaki). He enjoys the thrill of being close to death, which is why he decides to become aCitizen. He values fairness and ensures that neither he nor his team knows the locations of the items during their games.

characters.name: Hinako Daimon
characters.description: Hinako Daimon Hinako DaimonKanji大門 妃納子Furiganaタイモン ひなこRomajiDaimon HinakoBiological InformationHair colorBrownEye colorDark brownStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationOccupationUnderground loan sharkBorderland citizenshipPlayerSpecialtyDiamondsDebutChapterSixth Side Story (1)Hinako Daimon(大門妃納子,Daimon Hinako)is a minor character inAlice in Borderland, who participates in theKing of Diamondsgame, "Beauty Contest". Daimon has rough, spiked hair styled to her left, which reaches her shoulders and is dyed in a gray and black streak pattern. The right side of her scalp is buzzed. Her face is decorated with a moderate amount of lipstick and thick, sharp eyelashes. Her right ear includes four hooped piercings, two on her earlobe and two on her upper helix. Daimon is a boisterous young woman, confident in her attractive appearance and high intelligence. Due to her occupation, she does not enjoy staying in someone's debt, which is why she prefers to repay it. However, she also claims to be "not nice enough" when it comes to consistently helping others, since she cares only about her own success and survival. She regularly hints at her occupation to the other players, such as mentioning how she can calculate illegal high-interest loans, naming lawyers as her "mortal enemy", and half-admitting that she lends money to people.

characters.name: Ippei Oki
characters.description: Ippei Oki Ippei OkiKanji太木 一瓶Furiganaおおき イッペーRomajiOoki IppeeBiological InformationHair colorBlackStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationBorderland citizenshipPlayerDebutChapterChapter 44Ippei Ōki(太木一瓶,Ooki Ippee)is a minor character inAlice in Borderland, who participates in theJack of Heartsgame, "Solitary Confinement". Ippei is a short young man with medium-length, tightly curled hair forming a rounded afro shape. He typically wears a collared shirt layered under a patterned sweater with a horizontal geometric stripe across the chest and sleeves, along with baggy jeans and sneakers. There is a noticeable bandage on his left cheek, suggesting he has been injured in a previous game. Ippei is a decisive and kind-hearted individual who struggles with witnessing injustice and attempts to help the people around him.
